summary: The pnpm audit job failed with exit code 1, but the log context provided is incomplete. Only a single error line indicating process failure and a truncated warning about repository configuration are visible.
root_cause: The actual error message is not visible in the provided context. Only a generic exit code 1 and a truncated warning hint are shown.

evidence.reason: Confirms the job failed, but provides no detail about the underlying cause.

evidence.quote: hint: to use in all of your new repositories, which will suppress th...
evidence.reason: A truncated warning mentioning repositories, likely git-related, but incomplete text prevents diagnosis.

suggested_fix: Provide the complete error message and full pnpm audit output from the workflow logs to diagnose the root cause.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
